StructurePhase.Reference: Gambke T., Elschner B., Schaafhausen J., Phys. Lett. A, v78 p413 (1980)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: NO3. LPF Collection Code: 533465. Article Title: INTERMEDIATE VALENCE OF Ce IN Ce1-xScxPd3. Minor Warning: No e.s.d reported/abstracted on the cell dimension. No R factor reported/abstracted. LPF Editor Comment: editor deduced probable site occupation from nominal composition. Wyckoff Sequence: c a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.
